summary: Tested new Swarm features: Device Groups CRUD, Device Tagging, USB Scan, AI Threat Prioritization with MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and Windows Batch Installer. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend Swarm Dashboard loads correctly with groups/tags state variables. Fixed syntax error in swarm.py (duplicate filename line).
passed_tests: POST /api/swarm/groups - Create device group (returns group_id, name, color)
GET /api/swarm/groups - List device groups with device counts
PUT /api/swarm/groups/{group_id} - Update device group
DELETE /api/swarm/groups/{group_id} - Delete device group
GET /api/swarm/tags - List all unique tags
PUT /api/swarm/devices/{ip}/tags - Update device tags (returns 404 for non-existent device)
PUT /api/swarm/devices/{ip}/group - Assign device to group
POST /api/swarm/usb/scan - Initiate USB scan (returns scan_id, status: queued)
GET /api/swarm/usb/scans - List USB scan results
GET /api/swarm/usb/scans?host_id=xxx - Filter USB scans by host
POST /api/swarm/usb/scan/{scan_id}/results - Submit scan results (calculates threat_level)
POST /api/swarm/threats/prioritize - AI threat prioritization with MITRE ATT&CK mapping
GET /api/swarm/threats/mitre-mapping - Get MITRE ATT&CK tactic mapping (12 tactics, 40+ keywords)
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/windows-installer - Download Windows batch file
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/batch - Download via 'batch' alias
Full group workflow: create -> list -> verify -> delete -> verify deletion
Swarm Dashboard loads at /swarm with data-testid='swarm-dashboard'
Swarm Dashboard has 4 tabs: Setup Scanner, Devices, Telemetry, Deployments
Swarm Dashboard shows stats: Discovered Devices, Active Agents, Telemetry Events, Deployments
Swarm Dashboard has Scan Network and Deploy All buttons
Swarm Dashboard has Download Scanner and Download Mobile Agent buttons
SwarmDashboard.jsx has groups and allTags state variables (lines 29-30)
Windows batch file exists at /app/scripts/install_seraph_windows.bat
seed_data_creation: Created test groups, USB scans, and scan results during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Swarm features are working: Device Groups CRUD (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/swarm/groups), Device Tagging (PUT /api/swarm/devices/{ip}/tags, GET /api/swarm/tags), USB Scan (POST /api/swarm/usb/scan, GET /api/swarm/usb/scans, POST /api/swarm/usb/scan/{scan_id}/results), AI Threat Prioritization with MITRE ATT&CK (POST /api/swarm/threats/prioritize, GET /api/swarm/threats/mitre-mapping), Windows Batch Installer (GET /api/swarm/agent/download/windows-installer). SwarmDashboard.jsx has groups and allTags state variables. Fixed syntax error in swarm.py.
